title: Cognitive Firewall Instruments — authoring defensive instruments against AI-mediated analytic corruption
public_claim: An instrument design surface for turning the capstone's cognitive-firewall idea into usable checks.
distinctive_mechanism: It moves from scenario, evidence packet, analytic method, output, failure-mode tag, pattern card, countermeasure proposal, and export record without losing provenance.
use_value: It matters because cognitive firewalls only become useful when they are operationalized as inspectable instruments, not metaphors.

component_proofs.claim_supported: An instrument design surface for turning the capstone's cognitive-firewall idea into usable checks.

component_proofs.expected_output: what the packet is and what decision it can still change

claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
